Duplicate case values within one selection are rejected.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config => CONFIGDIR
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- store/store.go --
package store

//fabrik:config store
type Config struct {
	Kind string `yaml:"kind" default:"memory"`
}

//fabrik:provider:select store.kind
type Store interface {
	Greet(name string) string
}

type A struct{}

func (*A) Greet(name string) string { return name }

//fabrik:provider case=memory
func NewA() *A { return nil }

type B struct{}

func (*B) Greet(name string) string { return name }

//fabrik:provider case=memory
func NewB() *B { return nil }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"app/store"
)

type API struct {
	Store store.Store
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (a *API) Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/diags --
error: store/store.go:24:1: duplicate implementation for case=memory
  help: first declared at $WORK/store/store.go:17:1
